components.name: Sidebar sits below Level 2 Topbar. Does not include a company logo, search or user avatar.
Sidebar sits beside a Level 1 Topbar. Includes a company logo but does not have search or a user avatar.
Sidebar should be used on its own. Features company logo, search and user avatar.
Topbar sits beside a Level 2 sidebar. Does not include company logo or nav links.
Topbar sits beside a Level 2 sidebar. Does not include company logo or nav links.
Topbar sits above a Level 1 sidebar. Includes a company logo but does not have nav links.
Topbar should be used alone and features company logo and nav links.
